# zstack_cluster (Resource)

Manage ZStack clusters. A cluster is a logical grouping of compute hosts within a zone.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hypervisor_type` (String) The type of hypervisor used by the cluster (e.g., KVM).
- `name` (String) The name of the cluster.
- `zone_uuid` (String) The UUID of the zone to which the cluster belongs.

### Optional

- `architecture` (String) The architecture of the cluster (e.g., x86_64, aarch64).
- `description` (String) The description of the cluster.
- `state` (String) The state of the cluster (Enabled, Disabled).
- `type` (String) The type of the cluster.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the cluster.
